docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, HALLIE HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
